added: Exam Mode v2 — question bank CRUD (create/edit/delete), exercise player (MCQ/fill-blank/problem), auto-scoring with per-question feedback, results history with stats
AI-powered question generation — 3 data source modes (keyword-only / web URL fetch / file upload + paste text)
One-click import — JSON URL, JSON/CSV file upload, PDF/Word→AI extract questions
GitHub sync API — export/import exam questions via GitHub raw URLs
Mango DNA preview page — hero, 4 feature cards, creation flow timeline, persona card, agent gallery
Dynamic custom subjects — add/delete subjects via SubjectManager, SubjectId→string, localStorage persistence
PWA support — manifest.json, service worker, installable on iOS/Android
Mobile bottom tab bar — 6-tab app-style navigation
Custom app icon — all sizes (favicon, apple-touch-icon, PWA icons)
Knowledge Hub resource upload — add/delete resources with localStorage persistence
Study Planner task creation dialog — add tasks with subject/priority/duration
Apple-style mobile design system — frosted glass header/nav, borderless shadow cards, SF Pro font stack, bold titles
fixed: 500 MIDDLEWARE_INVOCATION_FAILED — env vars parsed as literal quotes, now sanitized
Guest mode entry — document.cookie→server-side /api/guest cookie setter
Client-side hydration crash — Date()/Math.random() moved to useEffect
Duplicate AI gen/import buttons — unified to single toolbar in exam-content
Local dev cache corruption (tailwind-merge.js missing) — documented recovery
improved: Mobile UI — desktop/mobile separate shells with independent layouts
Global CSS — removed aggressive grid overrides, replaced with shadow-based cards
Bottom nav — frosted glass, active-state scale animation, strokeWidth switching
Dashboard greeting — bold Apple-style typography with uppercase date
Brand card — gradient background with tag pills visible only on mobile
Sidebar — simplified mobile top bar, profile entry in drawer
All pages connected to live useStore() data — no more hardcoded mock arrays
